{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan royal army
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The soldiers in the camp wear red-and-gold clothes which is the uniform of the [[Damascan royal army]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan royal army]] has a camp where [[Leah]] was found.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
